reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 풉백으로 기분전환이 가능할 쥴이야 ㅋㅋㅋ 오늘 쓰자마자 괜히 예쁘고 그렇더라구요? 저는 바잇미 초록색이랑 컬러팝 풉백 조합으로 질리기 전까지 재구매하겠읍니다
reviews.content_en: You can change your mood with the poop bag lol 😄 It looked prettier than expected as soon as I used it today? I'll repurchase this with the BITE ME green and COLOR POP poop bag combo until I get tired of it

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 똥츄마저 귀여움..잘열리고 튼튼하고 좋아요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Even the poop bag is cute.. it opens well and it's sturdy, I love it haha

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 컬러풀해서 눈에 띄기좋고 단단해서 응아넣어다녀도 찢길 염려없네요!!  화려한 색상이라 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The colorful design catches the eye and it's sturdy so I don't worry about it tearing even when I carry poop in it!! I love the vibrant colors

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
화려한 똥츄 ㅎㅎ
똥츄는 바잇미꺼가 젤 죠아요
reviews.content_en:
Flashy poop bag haha
I like BITE ME's poop bag the best

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 저는 바잇미 초록색 똥봉투 재질을 좋아하는데 이것도 같은 재질이에요! 알록달록해서 예쁘고..똥도 잘 안보여서 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: I love the material of the BITE ME green poop bag and this one has the same material! It's colorful and pretty.. and the poop doesn't show much so I like that!

reviews.name: 엄****
reviews.content: 색상 모두 너무 이쁩니다. 봉투도 쉽게 열려서 사용하기  좋습니다 세일해서 저렴하게 구매했습니다
reviews.content_en: All the colors are so pretty. The bags open easily so it's convenient to use. I got it on sale so it was affordable

reviews.name: 감****
reviews.content:
개인적으로 컬러팝 풉백 4종에서 가장 좋아하는 스마일 노랑이 봉투 ♡
너무 얇지 않고 정말 안찢어지고 짱짱해요. 일반 초록색 풉백보다 디자인이 너무 귀여워서 강아지와 산책이 조금 더 기분이 좋은 느낌이었어요. 
그날그날 기분에 따라 풉백 고르는 재미도 덤~
reviews.content_en:
Personally, my favorite from the COLOR POP poop bag 4-pack is the smile yellow one ♡
It's not too thin and really doesn't tear - it's super sturdy. The design is so much cuter than the regular green poop bag that walks with my dog feel a bit more pleasant.
Bonus fun of choosing a poop bag depending on my mood each day~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 실외배변하는 한살 안된 진돗개 키우고 있어요~ 나에게 ~ 그리고 울 댕댕이에게 맞는 배변봉투를 찾느라 이것저것 써봤는데 참 힘들어요~ 다른 좋은 배변봉투들도 많지만 그중에 바잇미가 저는 최고 맘에 들었어요~ 디자인은 물론이고 한겨울에도 맨손이던 장갑 낀 손이던 입구가 잘 벌어져서 승질 안버리고 ㅋㅋ 바로 작업돌입 할 수있는 점~ 똥줍하려다 봉투 입구땜에 현타여러번~ 흐느적 대지않는 적당한 탄탄함에 대형견 응아도 척척줍줍 ~ 저는 향기나면 섞여서속이 더 울렁거려서 무향이 좋더라구여~ 그래서 저는 바잇미에 적창하고 싶네여~ 할인 많이많이 해주새오~ 이쁜  디자인도 많이많이 맹그러 주새오~
reviews.content_en: I'm raising a puppy Korean Jindo dog that does its business outside~ I've tried all kinds of poop bags to find one that works for me and my pup, and it's been tough~ There are other good poop bags out there but BITE ME is my favorite~ Not only the design but even in the middle of winter whether I'm barehanded or wearing gloves, the opening spreads well so I don't waste time fumbling lol I can get right to work~ I've had reality checks multiple times because of the bag opening when trying to pick up poop~ The right amount of firmness that doesn't flop around, so even large dog poop comes off clean and easy~ I prefer unscented because scents mix and make me feel more nauseous~ So I really want to stick with BITE ME~ Please give lots of discounts~ And please make lots of pretty designs~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 순전히 제가 좋아서 사는 배변 봉투~~시중 응가 봉투중 개인적으로 제일 예뻐서 두번째 구매했어요 우선 도톰하고 튼튼해요 응가 냄새도 확실히 덜 납니다(저희 아이가 양이 푸짐하고 보통 집에 가지고 와서 버리는 경우가 많아서 가방에 오래 담고 다녀요)
reviews.content_en: Poop bags that I buy purely because I like them~ Out of all the poop bags on the market, these are personally the prettiest so I'm on my second purchase. First, they're thick and durable. The poop smell is definitely less noticeable (my dog poops a lot and I usually bring it home and throw it away later, so I carry it in my bag for a while)

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
진짜 제가 기존에 쓰던 풉백보다 탄탄하고 두꺼워서 찢어질 걱정없이 쓰고 뜯을때도 정말 잘뜯겨요! 
산화생분해 제품이라 넘 좋고 스마일모양이라 넘 귀여워요ㅜㅜ산책갈때마다 기분좋아요
reviews.content_en:
These are really thicker and sturdier than the poop bags I used before so I use them without worry about tearing, and they peel off so smoothly!
I love that it's an oxo-biodegradable product and the smile shape is so cute~ I feel good every time I go for a walk

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
배송빠르고 포장도 깔끔합니다 
크기도 넉넉하고 두께도 적당합니다
가격대비 매우 만족합니다
reviews.content_en:
Fast shipping and neat packaging
The size is generous and the thickness is just right
Very satisfied for the price

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 원래 초록색을 쓰는중인데 한번 사봤어요. 초록색은 다 좋은데 향이 저한테는 좀 진하고 건조한 계절에는 입구를 열기가 쉽지않더라구요. 초록색보다 좀 뻣뻣하고 더 바스락거리는 느낌입니다. 더 종이같은 느낌이라고해야할지. 종이와 비닐의 중간 느낌? 좀 뻣뻣 하다보니 장갑을 끼고 산책하는 겨울에는 봉투를 묶기가 좀 더 어렵게 느껴졌어요. 여름엔 괜찮을것같아요. 향이 없는게 너무 좋습니다
reviews.content_en: I was already using the green ones but decided to try these. The green ones are all good but the scent is a bit strong for me and during dry seasons it's not easy to open the opening. It feels a bit stiffer and crinklier than the green ones. More like paper texture I guess. Like a mix between paper and plastic? Since it's a bit stiff, during winter when I walk with gloves it's harder to tie the bag. Should be fine in summer. The unscented part is so good

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
이쁘고 넘 얇지 않아서 조아요. 젤 중요한 생분해가 되는게 고르는데 젤 중요한 조건인데 
다 부합하네요. 
원래 실외배변 보는 아이가 아니고 산책시 뛰면 장운동이 되서인지 싸는 아이라 오래 쓸수 있겠어요ㅋㅋ 
대만족
reviews.content_en:
Pretty and not too thin so I like it. Biodegradability is the most important factor when choosing and it meets all the requirements.
My dog isn't normally one to do business outside but when we go for walks and run it becomes exercise so they poop - so I can use these for a long time haha
Very satisfied

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 색과 모양이 너무 이뻐요!  두께도 적당해서 들고다녀도 잘안찢어지겠어요. 역시바잇미~~
reviews.content_en: The colors and shape are so pretty! The thickness is just right so even when carrying it around it won't tear easily. Classic BITE ME~~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
처음으로 구매해봤는데 너무 예뻐요❤️❤️
담번에 또 구매해야겠어요😍
reviews.content_en:
This is my first time buying and they're so pretty ❤️❤️
I need to buy again next time 😍

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 자연분해된다고 해서 구매했습니다. 알록달록한 색이 예쁘네요 사이즈가 조금 작아도 좋을것 같아요 두툼해서 쉽게 찢어지지는 않을것 같습니다
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it's biodegradable. The colorful colors are pretty and even if the size is a bit small it seems good. It's thick so it won't tear easily

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 배송 빠름 ㅎㅎㅎ 컬러풀하고 이뻐요ㅠㅠ게다가 입구가 잘 뜯어짐 이거 최고 ㅎㅎㅎ 튼튼하고 너무맘에듬 !
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping haha colorful and pretty ㅠㅠ plus the opening peels off so well this is the best haha it's sturdy and I love it so much!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 호기심에 사봤는데 기존 노란색이랑 재질이 같네요. 화사하고 이쁘고 더 살 걸 그랬어요^^
reviews.content_en: I bought it out of curiosity and it's the same material as the existing yellow ones. Fresh and pretty and I wish I had bought more ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 정말 컬러풀하고 4가지 패턴이나 있어서 산책하는 소소한 재미를 주네요! 배변봉투 사이즈도 넉넉한 편이고 너무 얇지도 않고 생분해되는 친환경이라서 더 좋고 잘 쓰고 있습니다
reviews.content_en: Really colorful with 4 different patterns so it adds a little fun to our walks! The poop bag size is generous and not too thin and it's eco-friendly biodegradable so even better and I'm using it well

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
크고 튼튼해요 색도 예뻐서 좋아요! 중대형견 응아도 잘 넉넉할만큼
잘 들어가요! 배송도 빠르고 좋습니다!
reviews.content_en: They're big and sturdy and the colors are pretty too! Even large to extra-large dog poop fits nicely in them! Shipping is fast and great too!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
확실히.다른것보다 좀더.두껍고 튼튼해요.
예쁘기까지하고 아주 만족합니다
reviews.content_en:
Definitely thicker and sturdier than other ones.
And pretty too so I'm very satisfied

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
색감이 넘 이뿌고 여러가지라서 질리지 않아요
똥봉투 아무거나 쓰면 되지 하실 수 있지만 이정도 두께는 되야 찢어지지 않고 냄새도 안나요 굿!
reviews.content_en:
The colors are so pretty and there are so many varieties so I don't get bored
Some people might think any poop bag works but this thickness is necessary so it won't tear and you don't get smell leakage good!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 가격대비 좋아요 잘 열리고 두께도 좋아요. 컬러 화려하고 다양해서 응가 티가 안나서 프라이버시를 지켜주는데,,,더보기
reviews.content_en: Good for the price opens well and good thickness. The vibrant and various colors so poop doesn't show giving privacy but...

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 바잇미 제품 써보면 만족감이 항상 높아서 믿고 구매했고 역시 두껍고 열기 편하고 이뻐요 꼬 만족입니다
reviews.content_en: I always get high satisfaction from BITE ME products so I bought with confidence and as expected they're thick easy to open and pretty I'm very satisfied

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
네이버 쿠폰으로 저렴하게 구입했어요
바잇미에서 배변봉투 처음 사봤는데, 컬러풀하고 재질이 좋네요!
reviews.content_en:
I bought it cheap with a Naver coupon
This is my first time buying poop bags from BITE ME and they're colorful and great quality!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 탄탄하기도 하고 입구가 잘 벌어져서 좋아여~ 진돗개 배변봉투로 쓰기에 크기도 만족스러워요
reviews.content_en: They're sturdy and the opening spreads well so I like it~ The size is also satisfying for my Korean Jindo dog's poop bags

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 이뻐요 요즘응가봉투도넘이쁘게잘나오는거같아요 무향이여서 더좋아요 열심히사용하고또구입하러올게요.
reviews.content_en: Pretty I think poop bags these days are coming out really nicely and it's unscented so even better I'll keep using them and come back to buy more

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 두꺼워서 풉 냄새도 안나고 좋아요. 네이버페이로 할인받아 서서 더 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's thick so it doesn't smell like poop which is great. Even better because I got a discount with Naver Pay

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
풉백이 이렇게 귀여워도 되나요>_< 
통통하니 롤도 투툼하고 좋습니다~
reviews.content_en:
Are poop bags even allowed to be this cute >_< 
The roll is nice and thick and sturdy~

reviews.name: 코****
reviews.content: 컬러가 다양하고 색감도 예뻐요, 도톰하고 잘 찢어지지 않아서 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: Lots of color varieties and the colors are pretty thick and doesn't tear easily so it's great!

reviews.name: 코****
reviews.content: 사용하던 제품인데 잘 찢어지지 않고 커서 좋고 색감도 이뻐서 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: It's a product I've been using. It doesn't tear easily, it's nice and big, and I love the colors.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
알록달록 예뻐서 좋아요~
사이즈도 커서 배변 처리하기도 편합니다
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty with all the different colors~ 🎨 The size is also big, which makes it convenient for cleaning up after my pet.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
이건 집사욕심애 구입했어요~😆
ㅋㅋㅋ 배변봉투가 이렇게 이쁘긴 반칙!
기분이가 너무 좋아지더 라구요^^ 제품을 보자마자👀
아직 사용중인 제품이 있는데… 암튼 이뻐요!
잘쓸께요!!
reviews.content_en: I bought this because I'm a bit obsessed with being a pet parent~ 😆 ㅋㅋㅋ It's almost unfair how pretty poop bags can be! It really made me feel good^^ As soon as I saw the product👀 I still have other products I'm using but... anyway, it's so pretty! I'll use it well!!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 빨리와서 좋고 싸게사서 좋네요. 다양색상도 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Arrived quickly which is great, and I got it at a good price too. Love the variety of colors!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 색감도 너무 귀엽죠!!! 오픈이 쉬워서 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: The colors are so cute!!! And it's easy to open!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 디자인이 예쁘고 당일배송으로 편리합니다
reviews.content_en: The design is beautiful and it's convenient with same-day delivery.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 색상도 이쁘고 가격도 저렴하게 사서 너무 좋네요
reviews.content_en: The colors are pretty and I got it at a great price, so I'm really happy!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 회려한똥츄 주인도 이거하나로 힙해질수있음 ㅋㅋㅋ 너무쉽게찢어지는봉투는아니어서좋음 응아가 안보임 적당한 길이라 리드줄에 걸기 좋음 한번 투라이 해보세여
reviews.content_en: Even if your pup is a golden retriever, you can look cool with just this one ㅋㅋㅋ It's not a bag that tears too easily which is great. The poop isn't visible. The length is just right so it hangs well on the leash. Give it a try!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 색상도 이쁘고 사용하기 편해서 재구매했어요
reviews.content_en: The colors are pretty and it's easy to use, so I bought it again.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 배변봉투인데 너무 이쁘고 도톰해요
reviews.content_en: It's a poop bag but it's so pretty and thick!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
두번째  구매에요
튼튼하고 각기다른디자인의 봉투라 재미있어요
근데 첨에뜯을때 스티커가 잘 안뜯어져서 꼭 찢기더라고요
스티커를 바꿔주시면 좋겠어요
reviews.content_en: This is my second purchase. It's sturdy and fun because each bag has a different design. But the sticker was hard to peel off when I first opened it and it ripped. It would be great if you could change the sticker.

reviews.name: 엄****
reviews.content:
배변봉투로 사용하기 아깝게 색상이 너무 이쁩니다
산책시에  필수로  들고 나갑니다. 세일해서 저렴하게 구매했습니다
reviews.content_en: The colors are so pretty that it feels like a waste to use for poop bags. I always bring it on walks. I got it at a great price during a sale.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
사용하던 봉투 거의 다 써가서 찾아보다가 디자인도 너무 예쁘고 구성이 좋아 고민않고 구매합니다.
받아보니 너무 예뻐요^^
reviews.content_en: I was almost out of the bags I was using, so I looked around and found this. The design is so pretty and the composition is great, so I bought it without hesitation. When I received it, it was so beautiful^^

reviews.name: S****
reviews.content: 배변봉투는 늘 필요해서 세일할때 구매했어여~컬러감도 이뿌고 분해성 봉투라서 좋아여~ 잘쓸게여!
reviews.content_en: I always need poop bags so I bought it during a sale~ The color is so pretty and since it's biodegradable, I love it~ I'll use it well!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
아직 안 써 봤는데 여러개 사면 할인 하기도 하고 귀여워서 구매했습니다ㅎㅎ
배송 빨라요~:)
reviews.content_en: Haven't used it yet but I bought it because there are discounts when you buy multiple packs and they're so cute ㅎㅎ Shipping was fast~:)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
색깔도 이쁘고  양이많아서  오래쓸수있을것같아요 
산책시 꼭 필요한거라 많을수록 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The colors are pretty and there are so many that I think I can use them for a long time. They're essential for walks so more is always better!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 전에 구매한거 다쓰고 재주문했어요. 어떤건 쓰기도전에 찢어져서 못쓰고 버린게 반인데 이건 괜찮더라구요
reviews.content_en: I used up the ones I bought before and reordered. Some of the other ones tore before I could even use them, but these ones are fine.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
우리 댕댕이 산책용 배변봉투가 필요했는데 착한가격에 많이 샀어요
 색상도 예쁩니다
reviews.content_en: My doggy needed poop bags for walks so I bought a lot at a good price. The colors are also very pretty.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 무향인 배변봉투 찾기가 어려워서 쟁여두고 잘 쓰고 있습니다!! 재질도 아주 마음에 들어요~
reviews.content_en: It was hard to find unscented poop bags so I stock up on these and use them well!! The material is also exactly what I wanted~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
일단 너무 얇지도않고 딱좋아요
너무저렴한곳에서 사면 냄새도 안좋더라구요. 바잇미 최고에여
reviews.content_en: It's not too thin and just right. I've noticed that when you buy from places that are too cheap, the smell isn't good either. BITE ME is the best!
